translations.Access denied. You may not have permissi: Access denied. You may not have permission to access this file.
translations.Adjust the zoom sensitivity for mouse wh: Adjust the zoom sensitivity for mouse wheel and touch gestures.
translations.Annotations saved to your Nextcloud acco: Annotations saved to your Nextcloud account
translations.Are you sure you want to clear the depen: Are you sure you want to clear the dependency cache?
translations.Are you sure you want to delete all thum: Are you sure you want to delete all thumbnails?
translations.Are you sure you want to reset all setti: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?
translations.Authentication required. Please log in a: Authentication required. Please log in again.
translations.Auto mode detects your device capabiliti: Auto mode detects your device capabilities for optimal performance.
translations.Automatically adjust camera to fit the e: Automatically adjust camera to fit the entire model on screen.
translations.Automatically generate preview thumbnail: Automatically generate preview thumbnails when viewing 3D models. Thumbnails appear in file lists.
translations.Automatically rotate the model continuou: Automatically rotate the model continuously. You can still zoom while rotating.
translations.Automatically rotate the model when idle: Automatically rotate the model when idle.
Brightness of the global ambient light.
translations.Brightness of the main directional light: Brightness of the main directional light source.
translations.Cache model dependencies (textures, mate: Cache model dependencies (textures, materials) in your browser for faster loading.
translations.Cached entries older than this are autom: Cached entries older than this are automatically removed.
translations.Capture a PNG screenshot of the current: Capture a PNG screenshot of the current view. Also available in the modal file preview.
translations.Change the scene background color using: Change the scene background color using the color picker.
translations.Choose between Light, Dark, or Auto (Sys: Choose between Light, Dark, or Auto (System) theme.
translations.Choose the default view mode for the fil: Choose the default view mode for the file browser (Grid or List).
translations.Choose theme: Auto (follows system), Lig: Choose theme: Auto (follows system), Light, or Dark mode.
translations.Choose which formats to send directly. A: Choose which formats to send directly. All others convert to STL.
translations.Click a mesh in the viewport to focus it: Click a mesh in the viewport to focus it
translations.Click anywhere to pan - farther from cen: Click anywhere to pan - farther from center = faster
translations.Click anywhere to rotate - farther from: Click anywhere to rotate - farther from center = faster
translations.Click cube face to snap to view: Click cube face to snap to view
translations.Click on the model to add text notes. Ed: Click on the model to add text notes. Edit or delete annotations as needed.
Click on two points to measure distance. Switch units between mm, cm, m, inches, and feet.
translations.Click or drag on the circular ring to ro: Click or drag on the circular ring to rotate the model. Click farther from center for faster rotation.
translations.Click or drag to pan view: Click or drag to pan view
translations.Click or drag to rotate view: Click or drag to rotate view
translations.Click the panning mode button to switch: Click the panning mode button to switch from rotation to panning. Click or drag to move the camera horizontally or vertically.
translations.Compare two 3D models side-by-side. Sele: Compare two 3D models side-by-side. Select a second model to compare with the current one.
translations.Comparison mode is currently unavailable: Comparison mode is currently unavailable due to a technical issue. Please try again later.
translations.Configure automatic thumbnail generation: Configure automatic thumbnail generation for 3D files.
translations.Configure default camera behavior and pr: Configure default camera behavior and properties.
translations.Configure the file browser display prefe: Configure the file browser display preferences.
translations.Control the relative size of measurement: Control the relative size of measurement and annotation visuals. Values are percentages of the model size.
translations.Copy a link to this exact viewpoint: Copy a link to this exact viewpoint
translations.Customize the look and feel of the viewe: Customize the look and feel of the viewer.
translations.Customize your 3D viewing experience. Th: Customize your 3D viewing experience. These settings apply only to you.
translations.Cycle through quality modes: Auto (detec: Cycle through quality modes: Auto (detects your device), Low, Balanced, High, Ultra. Affects rendering quality and frame rate.
Default size of the grid in units.
translations.Delete all cached textures and materials: Delete all cached textures and materials from your browser. They will be re-downloaded when needed.
translations.Delete all stored thumbnails. They will: Delete all stored thumbnails. They will be regenerated when you view the files again.
translations.Dependencies (MTL files, textures) are c: Dependencies (MTL files, textures) are cached locally for faster reloads. Configure in Personal Settings.
Display the XYZ axes helper by default.
Display the reference grid by default.
translations.Download the model as GLB (with textures: Download the model as GLB (with textures), STL (for 3D printing), or OBJ (universal format). Large models show a triangle count warning before export.
Downscale large textures to save memory. Lower quality improves performance on older devices.
translations.Drag the controller by its edge to repos: Drag the controller by its edge to reposition it anywhere on the screen. Position is saved automatically.
translations.Enable momentum and smooth stopping for: Enable momentum and smooth stopping for camera movement.
translations.Export and send the model to a desktop s: Export and send the model to a desktop slicer app (PrusaSlicer, Cura, BambuStudio, etc.). Choose STL, OBJ, or PLY format before sending. A temporary share link is created automatically.
translations.Failed to sync annotations with the serv: Failed to sync annotations with the server
translations.File not found. The file may have been d: File not found. The file may have been deleted, moved, or you may not have access to it.
translations.For multi-mesh models, spread parts outw: For multi-mesh models, spread parts outward from center. Adjust the explosion factor with the slider. Only available when the model has 2 or more meshes.
translations.In panning mode, click the reset button: In panning mode, click the reset button to return the camera to the centered position.
translations.Individual files larger than this will n: Individual files larger than this will not be cached.
translations.Limit FPS to save battery or reduce load: Limit FPS to save battery or reduce load (15-120 FPS).
Load a model before sharing its view.
translations.Manage file indexing and database operat: Manage file indexing and database operations.
translations.Manually trigger a re-scan of your 3D fi: Manually trigger a re-scan of your 3D files if they are not showing up correctly.
translations.Memory pressure detected — switched to l: Memory pressure detected — switched to low performance mode. You can raise it again from the performance overlay.
translations.Model has ~{faces} faces. Enable Perform: Model has ~{faces} faces. Enable Performance mode (⚡) to improve FPS.
translations.Model is heavy (~{faces} faces). Perform: Model is heavy (~{faces} faces). Performance mode ({mode}) applied automatically. You can switch back from the toolbar.
translations.Model textures and dependencies are cach: Model textures and dependencies are cached locally in your browser using IndexedDB. This data never leaves your device.
translations.Models load instantly! Textures appear p: Models load instantly! Textures appear progressively in the background.
translations.Network error. Please check your connect: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
translations.Not watertight — volume may be unreliabl: Not watertight — volume may be unreliable
translations.Objects closer than this distance will n: Objects closer than this distance will not be rendered.
translations.Objects further than this distance will: Objects further than this distance will not be rendered.
translations.Open edges detected — computed volume tr: Open edges detected — computed volume treats the mesh as if closed and may not match the real enclosed volume.
translations.Quick-switch between 5 lighting setups:: Quick-switch between 5 lighting setups: Default, Studio, Outdoor, Dramatic, and Flat. Each adjusts ambient, directional, and point lights.
translations.Radius of annotation points as a percent: Radius of annotation points as a percentage of model size.
translations.Radius of measurement points as a percen: Radius of measurement points as a percentage of model size.
translations.Remember where you moved the controller: Remember where you moved the controller on the screen.
translations.Reset camera to initial position and zoo: Reset camera to initial position and zoom level.
translations.Save camera positions with display state: Save camera positions with display state (grid, axes, wireframe). Click a bookmark to restore the view. Bookmarks persist in your browser.
translations.Saving annotations to your Nextcloud acc: Saving annotations to your Nextcloud account…
translations.Selected extensions are sent as-is to th: Selected extensions are sent as-is to the slicer; all others are converted to STL.
translations.Send to Slicer creates a temporary 24-ho: Send to Slicer creates a temporary 24-hour share link — the file is auto-cleaned after use.
translations.Send your model to a slicer. Formats you: Send your model to a slicer. Formats you mark as passthrough are sent as-is; everything else is converted to STL.
translations.Settings for the on-screen navigation co: Settings for the on-screen navigation controller.
translations.Share this link to send the exact viewpo: Share this link to send the exact viewpoint.
translations.Show or hide coordinate axes (Red=X, Gre: Show or hide coordinate axes (Red=X, Green=Y, Blue=Z).
translations.Show or hide the 3D navigation controlle: Show or hide the 3D navigation controller from the top toolbar. The controller is draggable and can be positioned anywhere on screen.
translations.Show or hide the ground grid. Helps visu: Show or hide the ground grid. Helps visualize model orientation and scale.
translations.Slice through the model along X, Y, or Z: Slice through the model along X, Y, or Z axes. Adjust position with the slider and flip direction to view either side.
translations.Some textures may not load in this previ: Some textures may not load in this preview. For full texture support, open the model in the main 3D Viewer.
translations.Textures and materials are cached locall: Textures and materials are cached locally in your browser for faster reloads. Configure max size, expiration, or clear the cache in Personal Settings.
translations.Textures in subdirectories (like \"Textu: Textures in subdirectories (like "Texture/" folder) are automatically found.
translations.The app creates a temporary Nextcloud sh: The app creates a temporary Nextcloud share link that works with slicer applications. Link expires after 24 hours.
translations.Thickness of measurement lines as a perc: Thickness of measurement lines as a percentage of model size.
translations.This model has no additional files to pa: This model has no additional files to package
translations.Toggle between Perspective (realistic de: Toggle between Perspective (realistic depth) and Orthographic (parallel lines) camera modes.
translations.Toggle wireframe mode to see the model's: Toggle wireframe mode to see the model's edge structure.
translations.Transparency of the grid lines (0.0 to 1: Transparency of the grid lines (0.0 to 1.0).
translations.Unsupported file format. Please try a di: Unsupported file format. Please try a different file.
translations.Use the + and - buttons on the controlle: Use the + and - buttons on the controller to zoom in or out. Hold to zoom continuously.
translations.Vertical field of view in degrees. Highe: Vertical field of view in degrees. Higher values show more of the scene.
translations.View detailed information: vertices, fac: View detailed information: vertices, faces, materials, textures, and dimensions.
translations.Watertightness check skipped for non-ind: Watertightness check skipped for non-indexed or very large meshes.
translations.When the cache exceeds this size, the ol: When the cache exceeds this size, the oldest entries are automatically removed.
translations.Whether the circular navigation controll: Whether the circular navigation controller is visible when opening a model.
translations.Width of annotation labels as a percenta: Width of annotation labels as a percentage of model size.
translations.Width of measurement labels as a percent: Width of measurement labels as a percentage of model size.
translations.{count}M triangles — export may take a w: {count}M triangles — export may take a while
{name} is not installed on your system. Downloading the file instead...
